description:
Model a flat-roofed commercial building and install south-facing solar panels on the roof, leaving a 2-meter wide clear walkway down the center.

Instructions:
1. In SketchUp, draw a rectangular building footprint of 20 meters (East-West) by 15 meters (North-South).
2. Extrude the building to a height of 6 meters with a flat roof.
3. On the roof, draw lines to define a 2-meter wide walkway running North-South down the exact center, splitting the roof into two equal mounting zones (East and West sides).
4. Select the two side roof faces (the mounting zones). Do NOT select the central walkway face.
5. Using the Skelion plugin, insert Standard PV Panels on the selected faces with a Tilt of 10 degrees, Azimuth of 180 degrees (South), in Landscape orientation.
6. Save the completed model to: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\walkway_project.skp
